data.name: My Femdom Wife
data.detailed_description:
Relax. She’s in control now.

My Femdom Wife is an interactive POV visual novel that flips the script.
You don’t shape the story — you submit to it.

Your role is simple: listen, observe, and react.

Explore three unique stories — each ruled by a different Mistress. From bratty teasing to calculated control, each path reveals a new flavor of power and intimacy. Watch how relationships evolve, blur boundaries, and challenge your definition of submission.

The story unfolds almost entirely through the voices of the Mistresses.

You don’t speak much — you feel, react, and obey.

  • Three distinct Femdom dynamics: Bratty, Soft Dom, Hard Dom

  • POV-focused storytelling driven by female voices

  • “Girl Worship” system that tracks submission and attention

  • Clean, intimate visual style with subtle animation and music

  • Ongoing development with new characters and stories planned

data.short_description: My Femdom Wife is an interactive POV visual novel where you experience dominant relationships through dialogue-driven scenes, react to powerful female characters, and make subtle choices that shape your submission.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
